A.name: A - Conservative
A.description: MXFP8 all layers for rollout/reward, FP16 for gradients

B.name: B - Balanced
B.description: MXFP4 for tolerant layers, MXFP8 otherwise, FP16 for gradients

C.name: C - Aggressive
C.description: MXFP4 everywhere possible, MXFP8 fallback for sensitive gradients

D.name: D - Phase-Adaptive
D.description: MXFP4-biased rollout, MXFP8-biased reward, FP16-safe gradients
